summary: Kimi AttnRes replaces fixed residuals with softmax depth-attention. Block variant uses N=8 blocks for <2% overhead.
keyFindings: Pseudo-query w_l is per-layer learned constant
Block AttnRes: standard within blocks, attention at boundaries
Matches 1.25x compute baseline at equivalent loss
No production agent system uses attention-weighted context
decisions: Apply AttnRes to agent pipeline as AgentAttnRes
risks: Hand-tuned affinity matrix vs learned weights

summary: Implemented types, computation module, agent protocols, dashboard Attention Flow tab with animated SVG.
keyFindings: Attention Flow tab: SVG nodes + bezier edges + motion
Agent protocols added to scout builder critic guardian
Zustand store extended with AttnRes slice
decisions: Used custom SVG over Recharts Sankey for sci-fi aesthetic

summary: Built CC↔OC bridge: sync-residuals.sh hook, residual-bridge.ts parser, message-flow.tsx dual-path viz, OpenClaw SOUL.md + config.
keyFindings: Bridge file: residuals-bridge.md synced via pre-compact hook
Empire agent added with AttnRes protocol
Message Flow toggle shows dual OC/CC paths
decisions: Bidirectional sync: CC→OC via hook, OC→CC via dashboard parser
risks: jq dependency on Windows — needs manual install
